title: Mage -  Blue Abyss
description: Enter a world completely submerged in water after a cataclysmic event.
body:
![Blue Abyss](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2696d41b913e01810ca4e315321ea8c70f4aad95_0.webp)


## Challenge The Waves..
- 🚶New **animations**.
- ⚔️ **Better Combat** system.
- 🌊 The ocean is now **3x** deeper.
- 🐟 A new **fishing** system.
- 👽 **Alien**-like ocean mobs.
- ⚓ Ships patrol the ocean possibly looking for treasure or **You**?
- 🪸 New ocean **features**.
- 🌑 The moon has interesting **properties** perhaps they could help you?
- ☁️ The **weather** is also different on this planet.
- 🫧 New **drowning** visuals.
- 🌎 Luckily you found a singular **island** to live on.
- 👨‍🌾 More **farming** crops.
- 🩸 Better **visuals**.
- 👥 **Essential** for multiplayer.
- **JEI** for recipes.
- 🕶️ And **shaders** to make it look nice.

![Emark on a New Journey](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/741aeec18b55964c42215d3cf84a4216006b8042_0.webp)

Blue Abyss has a interesting start, having only one island in the entire world, you must use the islands resources to survive and thrive! There are many different islands you can spawn on and the possibilities are endless! Go out there and explore this new world!


Many mods like Create and Farm & Charm give you much to do on the island, start a farm? Or automate what you lack. Possibilities are endless in a small islands such as the unique one you start on, but what will YOU do with it?

![Explore the Deep](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b480ccc29f14b3eff5ecb3c23700bab8acfb999b_0.webp)

The oceans have been **overhauled**. The ocean is way deeper and new creatures lurk in the shadows. Explore these new seas and either succumb to the waves, or conquer them and claim them as your own.

Embark on new journeys and fight many monsters and even a boss! There is much to explore and conquer in these new world and its ripe for exploration!


![New Fish to Catch!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/beb09dab0dc165e87b057697caa9191557b373c7_0.webp)


With unique, fun mods like **Tide** and **Fish of Thieves**, there are many different types of fish for you to catch! Alongside the new fauna, there is a new fishing system. Reel in treasure, or another trout! 

**Thank you to all the mod and resource pack creators.**

**YOU ARE ALLOWED TO DISTRIBUTE THE PACK VIA A LINK TO THIS PAGE, AlSO YOU ARE ABLE TO MAKE CONTENT ABOUT THE PACK, YOU ARE NOT ALLOWED TO DISTRIBUTE THE PACK OTHERWISE AND MAKE PROFIT OFF IT**
